calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Philip Tam, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Deborah Dise.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement--------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Fourteen-Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Proof of Service-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 330 Clementina St., #305, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $2,160.00
Costs $210.00, for a Total of $2,370.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, APR-25-2007: CINDY LEE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT DEBORAH DISE THIS DAY.

THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER TAKEN OFF THE D-218 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR; TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-218).
